perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins in a room filled with glass display cases packed with anime action figures. A man in a white Lacoste sweatshirt and a woman in a blue camouflage jacket are talking to a person wearing a large, cartoonish Great Buddha mask sitting in a red chair. (2) The man in white is very animated, gesturing frequently as he speaks. He points to graphics on the screen representing band members and MV concepts. (3) The scene shifts to a man in a black shirt wearing large headphones in a studio-like environment, watching a monitor. (4) A rapid montage follows, showing a young woman playing a black electric bass in a concrete tunnel, the same woman smiling in a garden with pink flowers, and then walking with another girl both dressed in Japanese-style school uniforms.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio starts with a high-energy, fast-paced male voice speaking in Mandarin, accompanied by rhythmic, upbeat background music. Occasional laughter and brief responses from a woman and a deeper male voice are heard. (2) Sound effects including cheering crowds and applause are layered over the dialogue. (3) The audio then transitions into a full musical track, a pop-rock song featuring a female vocalist singing in Mandarin. (4) The song remains the dominant audio layer through the rest of the video, ending with a final drum beat.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional text provides subtitles for the spoken dialogue regarding a plan for the band '7月半'. (2) Decorative hook text in large, bold, or colorful fonts appears frequently: '沒有MV啊!!' (No MV!!), '三位女主角' (Three female leads), '獎金一人再發一萬' (Bonus of 10,000 for each person) accompanied by energetic graphics. (3) During the music montage, functional subtitles display the song's lyrics such as '愛是什麼' (What is love) and '你聽見我了沒有' (Have you heard me).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro/Announcement -> Challenge/Hook -> Music Video Teaser Montage

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male host, 1 female co-host, 1 masked participant, 1 male judge/technician, 2 female MV actresses.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: An Asian male with short brown hair wearing a white Lacoste sweatshirt and a white beanie. An Asian female with long dark hair wearing a blue camouflage pattern jacket.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An indoor room densely packed with anime collectibles and figurines in glass cases. Outdoor settings include a road inside a concrete tunnel and a park with cherry blossom trees and a lake.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright studio lighting for indoor scenes and natural sunlight for outdoor shots.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a high-energy promotional piece for the band '7月半'. It announces a competition involving three different versions of a music video, challenging viewers to watch them and see which one gets the most views within 24 hours, while promising cash rewards for participants.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The host explicitly mentions the band name and promotes their upcoming music video content with a call to action.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-speed Mandarin narration, signature use of a Buddha mask, variety-show style editing.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video utilizes a typical 'creator collaboration' vibe, combining vlog elements with professional music production teasers.
